name: Monthly Pipeline Review
description: Creates a monthly pipeline review task for the sales manager to assess progress and forecast.
descriptionAr: ينشئ مهمة مراجعة شهرية لخط الأنابيب للمدير لتقييم التقدم والتوقعات.

config.title: Monthly pipeline review
config.description: Review all open deals, update forecasts, identify at-risk deals, and plan strategy for next month.
